authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The article provides a practical, step-by-step guide to implementing memory-aware AI workflows in service businesses.
Content is well-structured and includes clear implementation steps, tools, and KPIs for measuring success.
The article emphasizes real business outcomes like lead conversion, response time, and customer satisfaction improvements.
It provides a complete automation stack using Notion, Make.com, Zapier, and OpenAI for building contextual workflows.
The article includes a checklist for implementation, common mistakes, and troubleshooting steps which is very practical for readers.
recommendedFixes: Add a section comparing memory-aware vs. traditional automation to highlight the unique value proposition.
Include a visual workflow diagram in the article assets to improve reader comprehension of the setup.
Add a downloadable checklist or Notion template to help readers implement the system directly.
Clarify the distinction between memory-aware AI and stateless automation in the introduction for better keyword alignment.
Consider adding a short case study or example scenario to further ground the framework in real business impact.
